original: You manage to duck under the tentacle, which swiftly returns to its normal size.
The slap connects with a sharp whip crack, sending you briefly staggering before you recover your stance.
You find yourself caught in the tendrils. A painful shock wracks your body, accompanied by a draining sensation. It’s sucking out your energy! You’ve been grappled!

The lightning leaves a black scorch mark on the wall as you roll out of the way just in time. You notice the jellyfish wobbling a little in the aftermath of the attack, its glow visibly dimmed."+({var0}?" Cracks have even formed on its tentacles.":"")+{var1}

original: You feel the searing heat of the electric blast wrack your body as it connects. It’s a small comfort that unleashing such an attack has left the alien looking noticeably drained."+({var0}?" Spiderweb cracks have formed on its dome.":"")+{var1}

original: You manage to duck down under the mass of writhing tendrils, which soon retract. How can it do that?!
